executives.name: Nicholas Cernotta
executives.background: Nicholas Cernotta is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the resources industry. He has held senior executive roles at Fortescue Metals Group and Macmahon Holdings.

executives.name: Patrick Walta
executives.background: Mr. Walta is a qualified metallurgist and mineral economist with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the Managing Director of Newcrest Mining Limited.
